headline: General Mills price target lowered to $35 from $40 at UBS
summary: UBS lowered the firm’s price target on General Mills (GIS) to $35 from $40 and keeps a Sell rating on the shares. The company reported a Q3 miss, with organic sales, gross margin, and operating margin all below expectations, and Q4 guidance suggests limited sequential improvement despite mechanical tailwinds from shipment timing and trade expense reversals, the analyst tells investors in a research note. With volume trends yet to inflect and peers focusing on affordability, category growth remai

headline: Diamond Hill Mid Cap Strategy Initiated a Position in General Mills (GIS) in Q4
summary: Diamond Hill Capital, an investment management company, released its “Mid Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fourth quarter posted another period of favorable gains for equity markets, with small and large cap positions being stronger performers, returning 2.19% and 2.41%. headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on General Mills, Lowers Price Target to $41
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains General Mills (NYSE:GIS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $43 to $41.
